description_long: This object is a medieval-style sword featuring a straight, double-edged blade with a pointed tip. The blade is metallic and has a uniform, flat surface with a subtle taper towards the end. The crossguard is simple and straight, extending horizontally to protect the wielder's hand. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a dark material, and capped with a round pommel at the end. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible engravings or decorative elements. The color palette is primarily metallic gray for the blade and guard, with a dark brown or maroon handle.
description: A straight, double-edged medieval sword with a simple crossguard and a dark cylindrical handle capped by a round pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and cylindrical handle with a round pommel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the profile of the crossguard and handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim profile of the blade and the handle's alignment.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, dark-wrapped, round pommel, simple grip
